title: The Highest Bidder
actors: Madge Kennedy, Lionel Atwill, Vernon Steele
plot: Henry Lester--a millionaire wary of women because he was jilted in early youth by a girl in favor of a man she thought richer than he--meets and falls in love with Sally Raeburn. Sally is chaperoned by her "aunt," Mrs. Steese, a s...
